transitionRows.trigger: Forbidden complement of the published machine.
transitionRows.guards: A system could revoke patient binding without opening repair and freeze the lineage invisibly.
transitionRows.notes: Wrong-patient correction must pass through correction_pending and repair/branch disposition objects before release or revocation settles.

transitionRows.trigger: Repair release settles and the branch dispositions finish releasing or compensating affected paths.
transitionRows.guards: identity.repair_case.closed is present in the repair casebook and canonical event registry.
transitionRows.closureBlockerInteractions: Repair closure removes the repair blocker but does not close the request directly.
transitionRows.notes: The repaired-close path is canonical in events and casebooks, but not yet serialized as a shared machine row.

transitionRows.trigger: IdentityBindingAuthority settles a corrected patient binding under release settlement.
transitionRows.guards: identity.repair_case.corrected and identity.repair_release.settled are published event contracts.
transitionRows.closureBlockerInteractions: Correction is still not canonical closure; it only clears the repair blocker.
transitionRows.notes: Corrected identity repair flow is source-traceable but not yet represented in the shared transition table.

transitionRows.trigger: Repair branches remain quarantined while contradictory downstream visibility is contained.
transitionRows.guards: repairCase.state = downstream_quarantined in the published casebook.
transitionRows.closureBlockerInteractions: Quarantined repair branches keep closure blocked.
transitionRows.notes: Quarantine posture is casebook-backed, but not yet serialized as a shared machine row.

transitionRows.trigger: Identity repair opens and freezes affected continuity on the current lineage fence epoch.
transitionRows.guards: identity.repair_case.opened and identity.repair_case.freeze_committed are both present in the repair casebook.
transitionRows.closureBlockerInteractions: Identity repair blocks closure and writable posture while active.
transitionRows.notes: Identity repair lifecycle is evented and casebook-backed, but not yet serialized as a shared transition table.

transitionRows.trigger: Manual replay review returns the authoritative settlement or a bounded recovery disposition.
transitionRows.guards: returned_settlement_ref is present on the reviewed collision case.
transitionRows.closureBlockerInteractions: Review closure clears the replay blocker without mutating canonical workflow directly.
transitionRows.notes: The review close path is source-implied but not yet serialized as a shared state machine.

transitionRows.trigger: A divergent replay collision opens manual review instead of mutating automatically.
transitionRows.guards: decision_class = collision_review and blocked_automatic_mutation = true in the replay classification matrix.
transitionRows.closureBlockerInteractions: Replay review remains explicit until reviewed settlement is returned.
transitionRows.notes: Collision review is a first-class proof obligation, but its open state is not yet serialized in the shared transition table.

transitionRows.trigger: Replay classification returns the prior settlement without new mutation.
transitionRows.guards: decision_class = exact_replay in the published replay classification matrix.
transitionRows.closureBlockerInteractions: No new blocker opens for exact replay.
transitionRows.notes: Replay review exists in casebooks and matrices, but its lifecycle is not serialized as a transition table.

transitionRows.trigger: Semantic replay collapses transport variance onto the prior authoritative settlement.
transitionRows.guards: decision_class = semantic_replay in the published replay classification matrix.
transitionRows.closureBlockerInteractions: No new blocker opens for semantic replay.
transitionRows.notes: Semantic replay is published as a decision class but not as a serialized lifecycle machine.

transitionRows.trigger: LifecycleCoordinator clears every blocker ref on the current lineage epoch and persists the empty blocker set.
transitionRows.guards: Published closure-blocker change events exist, but the blocker-set state machine is not serialized as a standalone transition table row.
transitionRows.closureBlockerInteractions: All blocker families must be empty before this transition is legal.
transitionRows.notes: The canonical closure blocker set is evented but not published as its own machine-readable state table.
